rationale: The proposed change to the Tax Code homestead exemption amount has no relation to Educ. Code §38.254, which governs a statewide student mental health plan. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: Sec. 38.254. STATEWIDE PLAN FOR STUDENT MENTAL HEALTH.
_note: No conflict; rule_text addresses student mental health planning and is unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions.
